subcodes.first_line: O thou who art lost and adrift! A hundred deserts hast thou traversed until thou didst drink from the cup of reunion, and thy head and face and hair [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بی سر و سامان دوست صد بادیه پیمودی تا از پیمانه وصل پیمودی و سر و رخ و موی
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Shrines and Holy places, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
